set.title: Astronomy
set.short_description: Nganh khoa hoc nghien cuu cac thien the va cau truc vu tru.
set.explanation: Concept nen tang cho nhieu bai hoc ve hanh tinh, sao, thien ha va quan sat bau troi.

set.title: Stone Meteorite
set.short_description: Nhom thien thach da pho bien nhat trong cac mau thien thach roi xuong Trai Dat.
set.explanation: Thuong duoc dung de hoc ve thanh phan vat chat ban dau cua He Mat Troi.
